title: Gardener (5 days)
description:
• MNC
  • Basic $2,000 + $2,700 + AWS + Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career Progression
  • Working location: Tai Seng
  • Working Days: Monday – Friday
  • Working Hours: 8:30am - 6pm

Job Responsibilities:

  • Monitor and maintain plant health through regular watering and fertilising
  • Remove weeds from garden beds and surrounding areas to maintain a clean and tidy look
  • Perform basic pruning to promote healthy plant growth
  • Trim small trees, hedges, shrubs, and grass
  • Assist with planting, display setups, loading/unloading, and preparatory work
  • Clear garden waste such as dead leaves, branches, and other debris
  • Ensure safe and proper use, handling, and storage of tools, equipment, fertilisers, and chemicals
  • Carry out pest control activities where required
  • Perform any other ad-hoc duties assigned by superiors 

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum 3 years of relevant gardening or landscape maintenance experience
  • WSQ certificates related to landscape maintenance are preferred
  • Experience in fertiliser and chemical application is an advantage
  • Familiarity with basic hand tools and light handheld machinery


Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Thien Ching Mei (R2198032)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
